concept: Imagine a shooter where your bullets can be redirected mid-flight through your telekinetic abilities. The momentum of each projectile must be conserved, meaning a bullet's path can be bent but its speed remains constant. Enemy designs specifically challenge this mechanic, with shielded foes requiring precisely curved shots to hit vulnerable spots. Environmental puzzles incorporate this mechanic as well, with targets that can only be hit through complex trajectories around obstacles. As you progress, you gain the ability to pause bullet time briefly, allowing for more intricate shot planning. Your character is hunting down fragments of an ancient artifact that enhances your telekinetic abilities with each piece recovered.
